name: YouTube Tags
description: Tag your YouTube subscriptions, filter your feed by tags, sort sidebar by watch frequency, and auto-categorize channels with AI.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://yt3.ggpht.com https://yt3.googleusercontent.com https://i.ytimg.com data: blob:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com;
